name: Egg Drop Soup#6
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat the eggs with a pinch of salt. Set aside.
2. In a medium saucepan, bring the stock to a boil.
3. Slowly pour the beaten eggs into the boiling stock, stirring constantly.
4. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Add remaining salt and chopped green onions to a serving bowl.
6. Pour the soup over the ingredients and serve hot.
Makes 4 servings.
